title: Is there any way to find workspace id from monday.com application UI?
excerpt:
Currently there is no direct retrieve support for workspaces in the GraphQL API. We can retrieve workspaces only using retrieve boards. Is there any way user can get the workspace id in the monday.com application UI? 
Re…

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently there is no direct retrieve support for workspaces in the GraphQL API. We can retrieve workspaces only using retrieve boards. Is there any way user can get the workspace id in the monday.com application UI?

Regards,
Prashanth

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: I guess the last part of the URL shown in the browser when selecting Workspace > Manage is the workspaceId.

posts.author: prasmadd (prasmadd)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @basdebruin

Thank you for you response. Can we consider always the board URL will have board id?

Regards,
Prashanth
